description_long: This lantern features a rectangular wooden frame with a dark brown finish, showcasing a grid-like lattice on all four sides. The panels between the wooden slats are made of a translucent, cream-colored material, likely glass or frosted acrylic, designed to diffuse light softly. The top is flat with four raised square corner accents, mimicking traditional Japanese or Asian-inspired lanterns. The base is slightly elevated on four short legs, providing stability and a subtle lift from the ground. The wood grain texture is visible on the top and sides, adding a natural, handcrafted appearance. The overall design is simple yet elegant, suitable for outdoor or garden settings in urban environments.
description: A rectangular wooden lantern with a grid lattice and frosted cream panels, elevated on four short legs. The design is simple, with visible wood grain and a soft, diffused light enclosure.
description_view_0: Front view shows the grid lattice and cream panel clearly, with the wood grain top and two front legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the same grid pattern and panel, but the wood grain and corner accents on the top are more prominent.
description_view_2: Back view mirrors the front, with identical lattice and panel arrangement, and the rear legs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the wood grain and top corner details.
